title: Smarter AI & Lightning-Fast Performance
description: RPLY just got a major brain upgrade! We've switched to Claude Sonnet 4.5 for significantly better AI-generated replies that sound more natural and helpful. Plus, the app now launches faster than ever, getting you to your conversations in a fraction of the time.
features: Upgraded to Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI model for higher-quality, more natural message suggestions
Added a loading indicator so you know exactly when AI replies are being generated
Dramatically faster app launch—your conversations appear almost instantly
fixes: Fixed AI replies containing unwanted formatting and line breaks
iMessage stats panel now correctly shows only iMessage conversation counts (not all platforms)
Improved analytics tracking for better app insights
